en.title: BusIsComing Citybus Lookup App | Routes, Fare and ETA
en.description: BusIsComing is an Android app for Hong Kong Citybus lookup, with saved routes, Citybus route comparison, fare, walking distance, and ETA details.
en.ogTitle: BusIsComing | Hong Kong Citybus Lookup Android App
en.ogDescription: Save frequent origins and destinations, compare Citybus routes, fare, walking distance, and first-leg ETA, then try the website demo or download the Android APK.
en.twitterTitle: BusIsComing | Hong Kong Citybus Lookup Android App
en.twitterDescription: BusIsComing introduces Hong Kong Citybus lookup, an online trial, and Android APK download.
